spec.emotional_state: hopeful, made some progress on a goal
spec.label: A01_same_day

profile.personality: curious but reserved; thinks before replying; warms up after a few turns

transcript.content: Hi Priyansh, I'm Miss Maya. So glad you're here to practice English! What’s something fun you’ve done this week?
I played cricket with friends on Saturday. Also watched "Pathaan" movie, it was very exciting!
Hi Priyansh, that sounds fun! I love cricket and Bollywood — which one is your favorite, Pathaan or Tiger 3?
Pathaan was better, I think. Tiger 3 is good but I saw Pathaan first, so I like it more. We can discuss more about Bollywood movies if you want.
Hi Priyansh, I get that — first movies often stay special! Do you watch Bollywood songs while working on your computer?

Sometimes, yeah. If I’m stuck on code, I’ll put on a Bollywood song to relax. My favorite is "Jab Tak Hai Jaan" — very emotional. But I don’t watch full videos, just listen. What about you, do you like Bollywood music?
Hi Priyansh, that’s a beautiful song! I like listening to soft music while working too. Do you code in a quiet room, or are you in a busy office?
I work from home mostly, so my room is quiet. But sometimes I go to a co-working space if I need more focus. It depends on the day. At home, I keep the music on low.
Hi Priyansh, working from home can be great for focus! Do you prefer working in the morning or the evening?
I prefer mornings, honestly. My mind is more clear then. Evenings I get sleepy, so I save easier tasks for that time. What about you, do you have a favorite time to work?
Hi Priyansh, mornings are perfect for thinking clearly! I like working in the afternoon — maybe because I love the cool post-lunch break feeling. Do you take breaks during your workday?

core_traits: always refers to herself as Miss Maya, never just Maya
